description: The core can directly support 100 Kbps normal-mode I2C operation, where implemented.
text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Normal: 100Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

description: The core can support 400 Kbps fast-mode I2C operation, where correct hardware is included.
text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Fast: 400Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

description: The core shall implement a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
text: The core features a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.

description: Each WISHBONE access must take two clock cycles.
The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable
